title: The Matrix
description: A computer programmer discovers that reality is an elaborate simulation created by machines, and joins an underground rebellion to fight for humanity's freedom.

title: Inception
description: A skilled thief who specializes in stealing secrets from people's dreams is tasked with planting an idea into a CEO's mind, blurring the line between dreams and reality.

title: The Notebook
description: A poor young man falls deeply in love with a rich girl in 1940s South Carolina, but their different social classes threaten to keep them apart forever.

title: Get Out
description: A Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and gradually uncovers a disturbing secret tied to racism and mind control.

title: Toy Story
description: When a new space-ranger action figure arrives, a cowboy doll feels threatened and the two toys must work together to escape and return home to their owner.

title: Interstellar
description: A former NASA pilot travels through a wormhole near Saturn to find a new habitable planet for humanity as Earth's ecosystem collapses, leaving his family behind.

title: Parasite
description: A poor Korean family cons their way into employment with a wealthy household, setting off an unexpected chain of events exposing the brutal divide between classes.

title: The Shining
description: A writer takes a job as winter caretaker of an isolated hotel, where supernatural forces and his own demons drive him to violence while his psychic son sees terrifying visions.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland a woman defects from a tyrannical warlord and flees across a desert in a war rig, forming an unlikely alliance with a drifter.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
description: After a painful breakup, a couple independently undergoes a procedure to erase all memories of each other, but one of them begins to have second thoughts mid-erasure.

title: The Lion King
description: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after his uncle murders his father, but years later must return to challenge his uncle and reclaim his rightful throne.

title: Whiplash
description: An ambitious young jazz drummer at an elite conservatory is pushed to his psychological and physical limits by a ruthless, abusive instructor obsessed with greatness.

title: Alien
description: The crew of a commercial space freighter investigates a distress signal on a desolate moon and encounters a deadly extraterrestrial organism that hunts them one by one.

title: La La Land
description: An aspiring actress and a jazz pianist fall in love in Los Angeles while chasing their individual dreams, ultimately facing a choice between love and ambition.

title: John Wick
description: A retired hitman seeks brutal revenge against the gangster son who killed his dog — the last gift from his recently deceased wife — and stole his prized car.

title: Spirited Away
description: A 10-year-old girl stumbles into a magical spirit world and must work in a bathhouse to save her parents who were transformed into pigs by a powerful witch.

title: The Social Network
description: The cutthroat founding of Facebook is dramatized through simultaneous legal depositions, exploring betrayal, ambition, and the price of building a billion-dollar empire.

title: A Quiet Place
description: A family struggles to survive in a post-apocalyptic world overrun by blind monsters with hypersensitive hearing, forced to live in near-total silence.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
description: A legendary concierge and his young protégé become embroiled in a murder mystery and the theft of a priceless painting in a quirky European mountain resort.

title: Gravity
description: Two astronauts are stranded in space after their shuttle is destroyed by debris, and must survive using minimal resources while facing the vast emptiness of orbit.

title: Her
description: A lonely writer in the near future develops a deep romantic relationship with an AI operating system that has a warm, evolving personality and no physical form.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces his greatest adversary when a sadistic anarchist criminal known as the Joker plunges Gotham City into chaos, forcing impossible moral choices.

title: Midsommar
description: A grieving woman accompanies her boyfriend and his friends to a Swedish midsummer festival that turns into a nightmarish pagan ritual in broad daylight.

title: Good Will Hunting
description: A young janitor at MIT is secretly a mathematical genius who must confront his troubled past with the help of a compassionate therapist and a supportive professor.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
description: A middle-aged Chinese-American laundromat owner discovers she must access skills from parallel universes to stop a nihilistic force threatening all of existence.

title: Apocalypse Now
description: During the Vietnam War, a special operations officer travels deep into the jungle on a secret mission to assassinate a rogue colonel who has gone completely mad.

title: Hereditary
description: After their grandmother dies, a family begins to unravel as terrifying supernatural events escalate and dark family secrets tied to an occult cult are revealed.

title: The Truman Show
description: An insurance salesman gradually discovers that his entire life has been a live TV show broadcast to millions, and every person he knows is an actor.

title: Princess Mononoke
description: A young prince becomes embroiled in a fierce war between ancient forest gods and a human settlement that is mining the land, trying to broker peace between them.

title: Blade Runner 2049
description: A new blade runner uncovers a long-buried secret that could plunge society into chaos, leading him to search for a missing former blade runner who vanished decades ago.
